# Datasets {#sec-bkg-datasets}

Throughout this book, we will rely on a set of publicly available datasets that 
cover different sequencing- and imaging-based spatial transcriptomics platforms, 
namely: Visium, Visium HD, Xenium (10x Genomics) and CosMx (NanoString). 

These have been deposited in an Open Storage Framework (OFS) repository 
[here](https://osf.io/5n4q3), and are thereby easily retrievable from 
within R using the `r BiocStyle::CRANpkg("osfr")` package.

Below, we briefly summarize the characteristics of each dataset, 
and note across which parts of the book each dataset is being used.

## Human Breast Cancer

- available at: [10x Genomics](https://www.10xgenomics.com/products/xenium-in-situ/preview-dataset-human-breast)
- published in: @Janesick2023
- Visium: 18,085 genes x 4,992 cells
- Xenium: 313 genes x 167,780 cells
- scRNA-seq: TODO

## Human Colon Cancer

- available at: ?
- published in: Oliveria?
- Visium: 
- Xenium: 
- scRNA-seq: 

## Mouse/Human Brain

- CosMx: TBD

## References {.unnumbered}
